title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containernetworking/plugins to v1.7.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containernetworking/plugins](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins) | `v1.6.2` -> `v1.7.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fplugins/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fplugins/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fplugins/v1.6.2/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fplugins/v1.6.2/v1.7.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containernetworking/plugins (github.com/containernetworking/plugins)</summary>

### [`v1.7.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/releases/tag/v1.7.1): CNI plugins v1.7.1

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.7.0...v1.7.1)

#### What's Changed

(Administrative note: the GitHub release v1.7.0 somehow got split in to two immutable releases. v1.7.1 is a re-release that corrects the issue. Apologies for the trouble).

##### New features / options

-   bridge: Add option to enable port isolation by [@​ormergi](https://redirect.github.com/ormergi) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1141](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1141)
-   Add a new firewall ingress-policy "isolated" by [@​swagatbora90](https://redirect.github.com/swagatbora90) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1140](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1140)

##### Other improvements

-   host-device: Return interface name in result by [@​sriramy](https://redirect.github.com/sriramy) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1147](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1147)
-   Add retries for netlink calls that may return a EINTR by [@​adrianmoisey](https://redirect.github.com/adrianmoisey) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1154](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1154)
-   Enable KeepAddrOnDown for ipv6 addresses by [@​mlguerrero12](https://redirect.github.com/mlguerrero12) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1155](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1155)
-   Implement exponential backoff in vrf plugin by [@​mlguerrero12](https://redirect.github.com/mlguerrero12) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1156](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1156)

##### Bug fixes

-   DHCP lease maintenance should terminate when interface no longer exists. by [@​dougbtv](https://redirect.github.com/dougbtv) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1143](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1143)
-   Fix addresses and routes reinserted to the VRF by [@​mlguerrero12](https://redirect.github.com/mlguerrero12) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1151](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1151)
-   Check error returned by ipv6 SettleAddresses by [@​mlguerrero12](https://redirect.github.com/mlguerrero12) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1168](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1168)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​sriramy](https://redirect.github.com/sriramy) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1147](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1147)
-   [@​swagatbora90](https://redirect.github.com/swagatbora90) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1140](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1140)
-   [@​dougbtv](https://redirect.github.com/dougbtv) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1143](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1143)
-   [@​adrianmoisey](https://redirect.github.com/adrianmoisey) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1154](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/1154)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.6.2...v1.7.1

### [`v1.7.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.6.2...v1.7.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v1.6.2...v1.7.0)

</details>
